constraints: All outcomes MUST write an AuditEvent regardless of outcome_type; auditing is not limited to declines

facility_id MUST be validated against OutreachAction.approval_status=sent for the same case before recording accepted or declined outcomes; returning 400 without this check creates a data integrity gap
facility_id MUST be null-permitted for family_declined and withdrawn outcome_types; the validation rule for required vs nullable facility_id MUST be outcome_type-conditional
Auto-cancel of outstanding outreach actions MUST execute in the same database transaction as the case status advance to accepted or placed; partial cancellation is not acceptable
sent OutreachAction records MUST NOT be canceled by the auto-cancel logic; only draft/pending_approval/approved states are eligible

Retry routing (declined_retry_needed → ready_for_matching or outreach_pending_approval) MUST be delegated to the core-infrastructure shared state-machine handler; this module MUST NOT write PatientCase.current_status directly
Case closure (status-transition to closed) MUST require closure_reason text and MUST be restricted to manager or admin role
organization_id scoping MUST be applied to all queries; cross-tenant data MUST never be returned
decline_reason_code MUST be validated against the decline_reason_reference seed table; free-text codes are not permitted
